summary: Lead accepts M4 stress validation after R1 QA REQUEST_CHANGES, replacement writer R2 repair, independent QA R2 ACCEPT, actual diff/path review, deterministic/performance gates, browser stress smoke, full tests, and package check.

tests_run.command: PR #104 CI / Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke
tests_run.result: Initial CI failed because the existing non-stress M4 campaign planner e2e still expected data-plan-count=1 and data-war-report-count=1 after the shared fixture was upgraded to two campaign plans/reports.
PASS after updating the existing non-stress M4 e2e assertions to expect two campaign plans and two war reports; 6 Chromium tests passed.
PASS after CI assertion fix; root 33 files / 240 tests and web 1 file / 4 tests.

decisions: Accept R2 stress fixture evidence: 4000-row browser path now asserts two concurrent campaign plans/forces, route bottleneck, supply pressure, siege, withdrawal, and two war reports.
Accept rainy-season evidence: forecast reason codes and actual cancellation status/statusReasonCode/day are recorded in one scenario path.
Accepted replacement test_engineer handoff because the original writer was closed after incomplete R2/no handoff and the replacement produced a valid R2 REVIEW handoff.
Removed the non-blocking test console.log noted by QA before integration; behavior and acceptance evidence are unchanged.
Do not mark CLOSED until PR CI passes, the PR merges, and local main matches origin/main.

After PR #104 CI exposed the existing full e2e expectation still asserting one plan/report, updated that assertion to two plan/report rows to match the accepted multi-campaign fixture and reran full Chromium e2e, pnpm check, and pnpm test.
risks: Stress fixture remains validation-only via opt-in fixture path, not a permanent player-facing affordance.
Performance metrics are single-machine evidence for this environment, not fleet-wide guarantees.
Future live multi-campaign query aggregation remains separate scope; this task validates pressure through client read-model fixtures and accepted simulation scenario tests.
requested_action: Commit accepted implementation, open PR, wait for CI, merge, sync main, then close the task only after main integration.
